text:
RepoPulse forecast (7-day breakout watchlist)

Method: reproducible baseline model using public GitHub signals (no LLM).
Breakout = +max(200 stars, +50%) within 7 days.

1) googleworkspace/cli | 97% | stars now 12671 → est 47404 (range 47360-47448)
   https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli
2) RightNow-AI/openfang | 96% | stars now 10973 → est 22213 (range 22153-22273)
   https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang
3) agentscope-ai/CoPaw | 96% | stars now 8789 → est 17075 (range 17027-17123)
   https://github.com/agentscope-ai/CoPaw
4) paperclipai/paperclip | 95% | stars now 3925 → est 14035 (range 14010-14060)
   https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip
5) maderix/ANE | 95% | stars now 5858 → est 15284 (range 15248-15320)
   https://github.com/maderix/ANE

Daily forecasts are logged publicly, then scored 7 days later (hits, misses, calibration).
#opensource #software #datascience #forecasting #github
